name: SOC Operations
description: Security Operations Center career pathway focusing on real-time threat monitoring, analysis, and response
overview: Comprehensive career progression from entry-level analyst to executive security leadership roles

name: Cybersecurity Architecture & Engineering
description: Career pathway focusing on security system design, implementation, and architectural solutions
overview: Complete progression from technical security implementation to enterprise-level security architecture and strategic system design

name: Cloud and Infrastructure Security
description: Career pathway focusing on cloud security, infrastructure protection, and hybrid environment security management
overview: Complete progression from cloud support roles to executive infrastructure security leadership with authentic NICE Framework work role alignments across multiple categories

name: Identity and Access Management
description: Career pathway focusing on access control, identity governance, and user lifecycle management
overview: Complete progression from basic access control support to executive identity strategy leadership

name: OT (Operational Technology) Security
description: Career pathway focusing on industrial control systems, SCADA security, and operational technology protection
overview: Complete progression from OT support roles to executive operational security leadership with focus on ICS/SCADA environments

name: Cybersecurity Education & Training
description: Career pathway focusing on cybersecurity education, workforce development, and instructional design
overview: Complete progression from associate instructor roles to executive workforce development leadership

name: Executive Leadership CISO Track
description: Specialized career pathway focused on preparation for Chief Information Security Officer roles and executive cybersecurity leadership
overview: Strategic progression from senior program management to executive CISO leadership, starting at senior level due to experience requirements

name: Program and Project Management
description: Career pathway for cybersecurity professionals focused on project coordination, program management, and strategic portfolio oversight
overview: Progression from project coordination to executive program leadership with responsibility for cybersecurity initiatives and strategic alignment

name: Technology Research and Tool Development
description: Career pathway for cybersecurity professionals focused on research, innovation, and development of security tools and technologies
overview: Progression from junior tool development to executive research leadership with responsibility for cybersecurity innovation and R&D strategy

name: Security Automation and Orchestration
description: Career pathway for cybersecurity professionals focused on automating security processes, developing SOAR platforms, and orchestrating complex security workflows
overview: Progression from automation analysis to executive strategy with responsibility for enterprise-wide security automation and orchestration initiatives

name: Customer Facing Security Roles
description: Career pathway for cybersecurity professionals focused on client engagement, technical sales, and customer success in security solutions
overview: Progression from customer support to executive customer security leadership with responsibility for client relationships and security solution delivery

name: Privacy Policy Legal Affairs
description: Career pathway for cybersecurity professionals focused on privacy law, policy development, regulatory compliance, and legal aspects of cybersecurity
overview: Progression from privacy analysis to executive legal leadership with responsibility for enterprise privacy strategy and regulatory compliance
